use_cases: Animate text reveals in hero sections to create visual intrigue
Add scramble-on-hover effects to interactive headings or buttons
Trigger text animations when elements scroll into view using intersection observer
Create attention-grabbing loading states or transitions
Build dramatic headline reveals for landing pages
ai_summary: A text scrambling animation component that reveals text through a randomized character effect. Built on the use-scramble library, it supports auto-start, hover triggers, intersection observer-based scroll animations, and programmatic control via ref methods. Lightweight atomic component suitable for creating engaging text reveals in hero sections, buttons, or loading states.
